node.text: Joanna finished her first full screenplay last Friday, which is a mix of drama and romance.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "screenplay plans January 2022") on Session 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Joanna plans to submit her screenplay to film festivals and hopes to attract producers and directors to check it out.

node.text: Writing allows Joanna to create wild worlds with interesting characters and serves as a great way to express her feelings.
